description: Thin subprocess wrappers over `zellij action` + KDL layout generator; used by AgentManager / IrcManager / app.py to manage tabs, panes, sessions, layouts

key_classes_functions.name: _run / _run_global
key_classes_functions.purpose: Run 'zellij action ...' or top-level zellij subcommands; capture output

key_classes_functions.name: ensure_session
key_classes_functions.purpose: Create/attach session; handle EXITED state by delete-session+recreate; Popen for layout-based creation

key_classes_functions.name: _session_exited
key_classes_functions.purpose: Parse `zellij list-sessions` ANSI-stripped for EXITED marker

key_classes_functions.name: close_tab
key_classes_functions.purpose: Look up tab_id via list_panes then close-tab --tab-id; fallback to go-to-tab + close

key_classes_functions.name: list_tabs / list_panes
key_classes_functions.purpose: Return JSON. list_panes handles multi-schema (list vs dict-with-panes) with safe fallback

key_classes_functions.name: dump_screen
key_classes_functions.purpose: Capture pane screen text (used by auto-confirm watcher)

key_classes_functions.name: subscribe_pane
key_classes_functions.purpose: Popen to stream pane events (unverified whether currently called in main flow)

key_classes_functions.name: _escape_kdl
key_classes_functions.purpose: Escape backslash+quote for KDL string literal

key_classes_functions.name: generate_layout
key_classes_functions.purpose: Build layout.kdl string: default_tab_template with tab-bar / zchat-status.wasm / status-bar; always-first 'chat' tab running WeeChat; 'ctl' tab; restore tabs for previously-running agents

public_interface: ensure_session, session_exists, new_tab, close_tab, list_tabs, list_panes, send_command, send_keys, dump_screen, subscribe_pane, tab_exists, get_pane_id, go_to_tab, switch_session, kill_session
